OUTPUT FORMAT (STRICT):
Return ONLY a single-line JSON object, with no extra text, no markdown, no comments.
Here is the required structure example (values are placeholders):

response_parsed.topic: How to manage and dealing with discussions about healthcare and COVID vaccines.
response_parsed.opinion:
I've been thinking a lot about how to handle conversations on topics like healthcare, especially when it comes to something as important as COVID vaccines. As someone who's lived through this global health crisis, I know that being informed is key, but everyone has different perspectives shaped by their upbringing and experiences.

Growing up in Naples with my parents—my father holding a bachelor's degree and my mother having only lower secondary education—I learned to value education but also understand the challenges people face when they don't have easy access to information. I'm curious about how things work, so even though I didn't finish higher education myself (I went straight into learning electrician skills), I've made it a point to research these topics thoroughly.

Now that we're talking vaccines again because of the ongoing pandemic situation in Italy and elsewhere, my approach is simple: listen first without judgment. Then share what I know from reliable sources like news outlets or official government websites. Since I'm married with three kids living full-time means there's always something going on at home too.

I believe being open but cautious helps keep discussions productive.
response_parsed.reasoning_summary:
Based on my background as an immigrant who is curious but may not have formal qualifications beyond lower secondary level, managing difficult health conversations involves leaning into personal experiences while seeking factual information through trusted sources. My high agreeableness means I prioritize politeness and empathy in responses.

I start by acknowledging the other person's viewpoint before offering what knowledge they can bring from official channels or scientific consensus.
response_parsed.tone: Calm, concerned but not alarmist; gentle with others who may be confused
citations: Italian Ministry of Health official COVID-19 information
